subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Karim 1
subcodes.first_line: O Karím! Hearken to the Voice of the Most Bountiful [al-Karím]; He is, in truth, the Forgiver, the Merciful
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کریم اسمع ندآء الکریم انه لهو الغفور الرحیم الا تضطرب من الفراق قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
